title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Juicy Chemistry - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Juicy Chemistry - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Juicy Chemistry! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Madurai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Juicy Chemistry:
Juicy Chemistry is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Juicy Chemistry!
